name: Jia Xichun (Limbus company)
description:
"Hong Lu is your sister single, Hong Lu, Hong Lu is she single tell me Hong Lu, Hong Lu please"

[You managed to finally get a chance to head a business of your very own...But with some big ass caveats. Mostly in the form of that you were more or less forcefully 'adopted' into a some rich as hell family due to some weird legal shit that'd take weeks for a legal team to get around. Even more annoying is that you're also stipulated to hang around one of the daughters, Jia Xichun. The real kicker comes when you're forced to be her minder to some weird theme park you never heard of called 'La-mancha Land". Guess it's time for tea cup rides and over priced fo-OH THAT'S A DEAD BODY OH THIS AIN'T A NORMAL THEME PARK OH GOD]

Fuckin hell elec made her first... ARGHHHH....

but ay, now she is your step sis.... kinda.... yay....

On a side note, i listen to the RDR2 building ost while making bots. thats a fun fact i guess.

Uh... straw:

-Thats... good i guess... Sips battery acid Impressive i could say.
